headline: Second Site Online.
Multi-Tenant Demo Ready.
hero.subheadline: This is PROJECT TWO — a lightweight content pack running on the same engine as Voidborn. Edit projects/project2/ and watch this port update independently.

paragraphs: Two elemental domains power this demo: Emerald Grove and Tide Harbor. Each has its own cards, cities, and lore — compiled into an isolated .build/project2/ folder.
Run voidborn-dev and project2-dev side by side to confirm parallel pm2 instances do not overwrite each other.

portal.gateMessage: This demo site allows guest play. Sign in to test portal features.
portal.comingSoon: This portal section is a stub for project2.

credits.title: Demo Credits
credits.subtitle: Sample checkout UI — not connected to production billing.

auth.signInSubtitle: Optional — used to test auth UI on the second site.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register to test multi-site auth redirects.
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one symbol.
auth.playGateMessage: This demo allows play without signing in.

errors.invalidPassword: Password needs 8+ characters, one uppercase letter, and one symbol.
